---
title: "Wavefield Propagation"
subtitle: "Forward Wavefield Through a Velocity Model"
author: "Felix J. Herrmann"
institute: "Schools of EAS, CSE, ECE — Georgia Institute of Technology"
date: March 4, 2026
footer: "[🔗 https://flexie.github.io/EAS-88-3-FH](https://flexie.github.io/EAS-8803-FH/)"
logo: "../images/logo.png"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: solarized
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    smaller: false
    scrollable: true
    center: false
    transition: none
    html-math-method: mathjax
    fig-align: center
    code-fold: true
    highlight-style: github
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

```{=html}
<style>
.reveal .slides figure figcaption {
  font-size: 0.38em;
  margin-top: 1px;
  line-height: 1.0;
}
.reveal .slides figure {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
.reveal section.notitle h2 {
  display: none;
}
.reveal section.notitle .columns {
  margin-top: 0;
}
</style>
```

## Velocity Model & Shot Gather

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 1

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t85.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 2

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t120.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 3

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t155.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 4

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t190.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 5

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t225.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 6

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t260.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 7

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t295.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 8

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t330.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 9

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t365.png)
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 1 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t365.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t365.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t365.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t365.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 2 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t330.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t330.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t330.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t330.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 3 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t295.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t295.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t295.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t295.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 4 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t260.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t260.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t260.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t260.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 5 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t225.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t225.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t225.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t225.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 6 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t190.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t190.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t190.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t190.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 7 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t155.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t155.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t155.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t155.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 8 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t120.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t120.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t120.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t120.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## RTM Imaging - Step 9 {.notitle}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Correlation integral](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_integral_t85.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t85.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather_t85.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}

![Adjoint wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/adjoint_v_t85.png){height="270px" style="max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
:::
::::

---

## Reverse-Time Migration — Result

![RTM image](wavefield_animation_simple/corr_full.png){width="75%"}

---

## Complex Velocity Model

![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_complex/velocity_target_sample_id=1.png){width="70%"}

---

## Forward Wavefield — $\mathbf{u}$

![Forward wavefield propagation](wavefield_animation_complex/wavefield_u.png){width="80%"}

---

## Adjoint Wavefield — $\mathbf{v}$

![Adjoint (backward) wavefield propagation](wavefield_animation_complex/wavefield_v.png){width="80%"}

---

## Source Correlation — Source 1

![Correlation for source 1](wavefield_animation_complex/correlation_src=1.png){width="70%"}

---

## Source Correlation — Source 2

![Correlation for source 2](wavefield_animation_complex/correlation_src=2.png){width="70%"}

---

## Source Correlation — Source 3

![Correlation for source 3](wavefield_animation_complex/correlation_src=3.png){width="70%"}

---

## Source Correlation — Source 4

![Correlation for source 4](wavefield_animation_complex/correlation_src=4.png){width="70%"}

---

## Stacked Correlation

![Correlation stack across all sources](wavefield_animation_complex/correlation_stack.png){width="70%"}
